TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Htin Kyaw ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 7, Htin Kyaw, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Burma ta' misuw hya' ga Htin Kyaw, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ńßtin kjaw rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ńßtin kjaw, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤urma ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ńßtin kjaw, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Htin Kyaw ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 7, Htin Kyaw, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Burma ta' misuw hya' ga Htin Kyaw, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ńßtin kjaw rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ńßtin kjaw, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤urma ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ńßtin kjaw, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
